rootCause: The remote smoke live-chat assertion executed in a clean Playwright browser context with no previously saved chat credentials/config, so the production chat send path returned the expected in-app error state for that anonymous session even while manual browsers with existing settings could send/receive successfully.
resolution: Made remote smoke live mode credential-free by default with a Playwright-scoped OpenAI client stub that still exercises chat textbox/send/user-message/assistant-message UI flow; added an explicit opt-in `--chat-live-backend=real` mode for true provider-backed validation when intentionally requested.
